crux: Interesting one, the N4 attack really scared me.
Landroval: i think that peep didnt work out for me

crux: That was the major one I looked at, and played H6 when I felt I could handle it.
crux: But still, the situation was uncertain.
Landroval: Yes, i didnt know how to attack that formation
Landroval: and ended giving you points. Maybe leave it as is for the time?
crux: I thought it looked large enough not to be attackable, but after N4 I suddenly didn't see eyes for it.
crux: I played M13 thinking I could leave that group, and didn't want to see a white moyo form in the center.
crux: Perhaps I should have played N6 first.
Landroval: yes, i was expecting that
crux: I also didn't like the result I got after L17 early in the game...

Landroval: but the sequence seemed normal
crux: That's what I thought, but the cut at K15 gave White rather more than I thought. Or rather, I didn't think.
Landroval: after l7 was there any other choice for white or was it all forced?
crux: Don't really know. You could have let me live and built the center area by playing the other atari after the push and cut..
crux: But I suspect it's not enough.

crux: Yeah... that's why I played in that area.
crux: Anyhow, I'll run it through Leela Zero and see what she thinks.
Landroval: Ok, thanks for the game :)

crux: What's the problem? Works fine on my Gentoo installation.

C[StrongDog: Thanks. Wishing you the same :)
C[StrongDog: It's very hard to decide between Q3, P9, or O8 here
C[StrongDog: Malkovich comment - this game has been pretty complicated. I'm glad I had time to sit and think about each move. I'd love to test my mettle against crux in a live game.
StrongDog: Thank you for the game.
crux: The live game thing we can arrange at some point.
crux: But first I'll have to run this one through Leela Zero :)
StrongDog: Sure. I'd like to play you live sometime. I'll buddy you so I don't forget.
crux: OK. What times are you usually on?
StrongDog: My friend just got that up and running on his machine. It's a terrifyingly strong. I lasted not even 90 moves.
crux: I'm using it to analyze all my games afterwards. I don't last very long trying to play against it either.
StrongDog: I'm usually good to play from 6pm to 12am EST. Weekends are more flexible. Are you in Germany?
crux: OK, that'll work somehow, I'm usually up way past midnight.
StrongDog: That's very late for you. Might be better to play on a weekend afternoon
StrongDog: Anyway I've I'm over the flu I'll message you.
StrongDog: Oh and also check out Go Review Partner if you don't already know about it
crux: I have it running on this game right now :)
crux: Alright, see you then. Get well.
StrongDog: Thanks. I appreciate that. Have a good one.
